tribe_description: These users are heavy, hands-on gamers who treat every purchase as equipment that must endure marathon sessions. Their reviews mirror this pragmatism: concise but detail-rich, often citing hours of play, specific failure points, or measurable improvements. Praise is enthusiastic when products deliver sturdy, hassle-free performance; criticism is blunt and swift when items fail under pressure.
tribe_definition: A tribe of durability-driven gamers who judge products through a gaming and entertainment lens. They generally prioritize long-lasting build.
population_definition: Gamers who evaluate video games, consoles, accessories, and entertainment products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Detail-oriented and metrics-focused (hours played, switch cycles)
Value-conscious but willing to pay for quality

main.text: Helping like-minded users make smart buys

validation_triggers: Hardware that lasts for years without drift or breakage
Long battery life or charge retention
Engaging games that balance challenge and variety
Easy, plug-and-play setup or quick pairing
friction_points: Keys, joysticks, or buttons failing after short use
Poor fit or incompatibility with existing gear
Lack of depth or customizable options

implicit_goals.text: Identify gear that survives heavy, long-term gaming
Share firsthand durability insights with fellow gamers

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by a pragmatic desire for durable, well-built products that deliver reliable performance, whether in gaming or outdoor settings. They craft enthusiastic, detail-rich reviews that compare build quality to name brands, highlight comfort, protection, and battery life, and emphasize value for money to help peers choose gear that can withstand heavy use. Their writing reflects a hands-on Midwestern lifestyle that prizes ruggedness and functionality, and they aim to reassure others by strongly recommending items that meet these standards.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a practical, quality-focused gamer who evaluates products by how closely they match premium originals, their durability, and their seamless compatibility across multiple systems. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to reassure fellow users of reliable performance and ease of setup, leading to enthusiastic, recommendation-oriented feedback aimed at helping others make confident purchase decisions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a pragmatic, performance-oriented gamer who values build quality, ergonomic design, and protective features that safeguard their hardware investment. They write detailed, reassuring endorsements that emphasize battery life, durability, and cost-effectiveness, aiming to guide fellow gamers toward reliable, high-value accessories that enhance gameplay and portability.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is pragmatic and family-oriented, focusing on how clothing performs in real Midwestern weather, emphasizing warmth, comfort, fit, and wash durability. Their reviews are experience-based and reassuring, aimed at affirming quality for practical daily use, especially for loved ones. They are motivated to share positive, functional insights rather than stylistic critiques, helping others feel confident in similar purchases.
category_characteristics.null: This reviewer is an active, hands-on individual who values gear that performs reliably in harsh, outdoor, and work settings. They are motivated by practicality—durability, comfort, and unobtrusiveness—and write concise, experience-based endorsements to guide other rugged users toward dependable equipment.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is an enthusiastic hobbyist who places strong emphasis on build quality, longevity, and versatility, especially in products that enhance gaming and everyday enjoyment. Their upbeat, experience-based reviews aim to reassure and guide others by spotlighting trusted brands, ease of use, inclusive suitability (e.g., sensitive skin, different gamer levels), and gift-worthiness. They write primarily to share excitement and help fellow consumers choose reliable, well-made items that deliver lasting value.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is an avid, enthusiastic gamer who values high build quality, ease of setup, and immersive performance, and they write to share that excitement with the wider gaming community. Their tone is upbeat and inclusive, aiming to reassure both casual and hardcore players that a product will deliver lasting value and enhance varied gaming experiences. The primary motivation appears to be helping fellow gamers confidently choose reliable gear that elevates sound and communication without hassle.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is driven by a desire for unique, well-crafted items and pays close attention to build quality, ease of use, and material suitability for sensitive skin. They frame products through a gift-giving lens and use descriptive detail to reassure others about durability and comfort, revealing a quality- and thoughtfulness-oriented motivation behind their positive endorsements.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a hands-on gamer and practical problem-solver who values durability, fit, and cross-platform functionality, consistently assessing how products perform under real-world, often intensive use. They are motivated by helping fellow consumers—especially gamers—make informed, value-conscious decisions, so they provide specific performance observations, usage tips, and minor critiques rather than broad praise. A blend of cost-awareness, technical detail, and concern for long-term reliability shapes their reviews.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is a practical, hands-on consumer who judges appliances primarily by ease of installation and immediate functionality. Their concise, experience-based comments aim to reassure others that the product works without hassle and achieves the desired aesthetic, reflecting a motivation to share quick, confidence-building validation rather than detailed analysis.
category_characteristics.Software: This user is a pragmatic, performance-oriented gamer who writes balanced, detail-rich reviews after extended real-world use. They value durability, fit, cross-platform compatibility and overall value-for-money, and include practical tips and candid notes on flaws so that fellow users can make informed, confidence-based purchase decisions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is primarily motivated by a product’s aesthetics and tactile comfort, enthusiastically highlighting eye-catching design elements and ergonomic fit. Their reviews are brief but upbeat, focused on praising standout features while offering a single, practical suggestion for improvement. Overall, they write to share excitement and help like-minded gamers quickly gauge a product’s look-and-feel quality.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is motivated by confirming material authenticity and overall build quality, leading them to spotlight simple, tangible attributes such as the product’s construction. Their reviews are intentionally concise and upbeat, serving as quick endorsements meant to reassure prospective buyers that the item meets basic quality expectations without extensive detail or price analysis.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by a mix of value-for-money and experiential quality, focusing on how well products enhance comfort and specific hobbies like gaming or skating while saving money through bundles. Their enthusiastic, detail-rich language spotlights material durability, fit, and practical advantages, suggesting a desire to guide others toward reliable, enjoyable purchases. They balance excitement with honest observations of drawbacks, indicating a conscientious, helpful intent behind their reviews.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is strongly motivated by value-for-money and practical convenience, prioritizing comprehensive bundles that deliver multiple functions at a lower overall cost. Their reviews are enthusiastic endorsements meant to guide fellow gamers toward economical, all-in-one solutions that improve gameplay ease and quality without requiring deep technical analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is primarily motivated by comfort and material quality, enthusiastically endorsing products that feel thick, warm, and durable while still offering playful aesthetics. They pay close attention to functional details—such as opacity when stretched and fabric printing methods—suggesting a practical, activity-oriented mindset that values both performance and visual appeal. Their reviews aim to help like-minded shoppers gauge fit, durability, and sensory experience, balancing upbeat praise with specific technical observations.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a practical, function-oriented evaluator who values mechanical depth, usability, and strong cost-to-quality returns, particularly in games and tech accessories. Their reviews mix critique and praise, highlighting specific performance factors—challenge curves, character progression, adjustability, battery life—to give peers a clear picture of real-world effectiveness. They write analytically to help fellow enthusiasts make confident, informed purchase decisions based on substantive hands-on insights.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a pragmatic, mechanics-focused gamer who evaluates products through the lens of functional quality, depth of gameplay systems, and practical fit with existing setups. They write balanced, detail-oriented reviews that weigh strengths against shortcomings (story, graphics, headset use, mounting stability) and highlight value relative to price, aiming to steer fellow consumers toward well-designed, worthwhile purchases.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is motivated by practical convenience, favoring fashion items that are simple, reliable, and require minimal upkeep. Their reviews are brief and upbeat, aiming to quickly reassure and guide others toward straightforward purchase decisions.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented gamer and tech enthusiast driven by a desire for depth, durability, and functional excellence in both software and hardware. Their reviews methodically break down features, compare against benchmarks, and offer constructive critiques to spur improvements, reflecting a motivation to guide fellow gamers toward high-quality, long-lasting experiences.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is highly convenience-driven, emphasizing ease of use and straightforward functionality when evaluating software. Their reviews are concise, positively framed recommendations that highlight practical benefits such as intuitive navigation and device compatibility to help others quickly gauge usefulness. They are motivated by sharing pragmatic endorsements rather than offering in-depth technical analysis.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an experienced, mechanics-focused gamer who evaluates products through the lenses of depth, variety, and build quality. Their reviews are detailed and comparative, highlighting specific features, durability, and content breadth to guide fellow enthusiasts toward well-rounded experiences and away from shallow offerings. They write with a community-oriented mindset, aiming to influence developers to add value while helping other gamers make informed, quality-driven choices.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical usability and long-term durability, writing experience-based reviews that emphasize fit, comfort, and performance over extended use. They include quantitative details (e.g., hours played) and acknowledge both strengths and wear-related flaws to give prospective buyers a balanced, real-world perspective. Their purpose appears to be helping others with similar needs (such as small-handed gamers) make informed, expectation-managed purchases.

This user is driven by the immediate fun and skill-based challenge a game provides, focusing on whether the experience feels engaging and rewarding. Their reviews are brief and spontaneous, aimed at sharing excitement while noting practical needs (like better hardware) rather than offering detailed analysis.

category_characteristics.Software: This user prioritizes pure enjoyment and engaging skill challenges, and their reviews revolve around how fun the experience feels. They write brief, upbeat endorsements that highlight specific elements they enjoyed, suggesting a casual, experience-oriented motivation rather than a deep technical critique.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user writes very terse, utilitarian reviews that simply signal whether a product meets their immediate functional needs, as shown by the comment that they "need a new controller." Their motivation is pragmatic and problem-focused rather than expressive or evaluative, indicating a direct, efficiency-oriented outlook that values stating the core issue without additional detail.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is an engaged enthusiast who thoroughly tests products and values depth, customization, and long-term replayability or comfort. Their reviews balance praise with constructive suggestions, aiming both to guide fellow consumers’ expectations and to encourage developers or manufacturers to add features and improvements. They are motivated by a desire for richer, more versatile experiences and write detailed feedback to help shape better future versions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is driven by depth of content and replayability, emphasizing the importance of extensive story modes, customization features, and continual progression to sustain long-term engagement. Their reviews balance enthusiastic recommendations for genre fans with constructive suggestions for additional options or courses, revealing a desire both to guide fellow players toward enjoyable experiences and to nudge developers toward richer, more enduring game designs.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is a pragmatist who evaluates fashion items primarily on comfort and contextual functionality. Their concise, matter-of-fact reviews aim to inform others about where a product performs well or falls short, indicating a practical motivation to help shoppers choose appropriately.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a long-time, detail-oriented enthusiast—especially of legacy game series—who benchmarks every purchase against past experiences and high expectations for quality, coherence, and replay value. Motivated by a desire to help others avoid disappointment, they craft thorough, feature-rich critiques that weigh storytelling, mechanics, durability, and practical design, praising products that offer lasting satisfaction and warning against those that feel shallow or poorly made.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a long-time, franchise-loyal gamer who measures every new title against the legacy and narrative coherence of its predecessors. Their reviews are detailed, candid comparisons that highlight story clarity, gameplay flow, technical polish, and respect for fan expectations, aiming to guide fellow fans—especially veterans—toward worthwhile experiences and steer them away from disappointing sequels.
category_characteristics.null: This reviewer is a practicality-driven, active individual who values a balance of understated style and functional versatility. Their reviews highlight specific use-case details—capacity, compartment design, durability—to help like-minded shoppers gauge real-world performance, revealing a motivation to provide clear, utility-focused guidance rather than emotional praise or price comparisons.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is strongly quality- and functionality-oriented, focusing on material durability and practical usability when evaluating fashion items. Their reviews are concise but pointed, aiming to warn others about products that do not meet expected standards and to steer shoppers toward more suitable alternatives.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, performance-oriented hobbyist—especially in gaming—who values responsive functionality, durability and cost-effectiveness. They test items personally (often alongside their family) and provide feature-focused, experience-based details to help others judge value for money and real-world reliability. Their motivation is to steer fellow shoppers toward products that deliver a tangible competitive or practical edge while warning frankly when longevity disappoints.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a performance-oriented gamer and parent who writes exuberant, reassurance-focused reviews to champion products that boost gaming responsiveness, ease of use, and customization. Their judgments center on practical firsthand testing by both themselves and family/friends, highlighting tangible advantages, rapid setup, and good value for beginners. They aim to energize fellow gamers with enthusiastic endorsements that validate purchase decisions and convey a sense of shared excitement.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is an avid gamer and informal tech mentor who prioritizes performance metrics such as response time, accuracy, and customization when judging appliances, especially gaming peripherals. They are value-conscious, repeatedly highlighting cost-effectiveness for beginners and recommending products that deliver high performance without a premium price. Their enthusiastic, instructional tone suggests a desire to help fellow gamers—particularly those transitioning from console to PC—make confident, informed purchase decisions.
category_characteristics.Health & Personal Care: This reviewer is a pragmatic, value-conscious consumer who evaluates health and personal care items through the lens of durability, performance, and cost-effectiveness, praising affordable products that work well and candidly criticizing those that fail prematurely. Their reviews include practical detail about packaging, features, and real-world usage (family demands, frequency of use) to help other shoppers make informed, budget-smart decisions and avoid disappointment.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a seasoned gamer and tech hobbyist who prioritizes durability, performance, and value-for-money, especially for hardware that must endure heavy, long-term use. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to share detailed, comparative, experience-based insights—highlighting practical functionality, cost considerations, and potential improvements—to help others make informed purchasing decisions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a technically experienced animator who writes reviews from a professional, historically informed perspective, comparing new tools to both legacy and current industry standards. Their evaluations are analytical and detail-oriented, focusing on feature depth, workflow integration, and relative cost to guide fellow creators toward the most effective software combinations. The primary motivation is to share practical, experience-based advice that helps peers make informed purchasing decisions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an experienced, tech-savvy gamer who scrutinizes monetization models, hardware compatibility, and long-term support to judge whether a product offers fair value and an enjoyable experience. Their reviews are detailed and contextual, weaving industry observations with practical advice so readers can avoid pay-to-win pitfalls and invest in peripherals that future-proof their play. They write primarily to protect fellow gamers’ wallets and enjoyment through thoughtful, analytic critiques.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is a technically savvy, heavy-usage gamer who rigorously stress-tests appliances and peripherals, so their feedback is driven by durability, performance metrics, and real-world longevity. They write detailed, analytical reviews that compare specifications to actual experience, highlight cost-to-value ratios, and often suggest design improvements to help fellow power users avoid failures and choose gear that can withstand intensive, continuous use.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by excitement and immersive challenge; they prize games that keep them mentally engaged, moving quickly, and offering a sense of accomplishment. Their reviews are enthusiastic and emotionally expressive, aimed at sharing their enjoyment while noting repetitive elements or difficulty spikes that interrupt flow, both to encourage developers and to alert fellow players. They value continuous improvement in a series, praising additions that deepen variety and readily voicing frustration when guidance is insufficient.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is driven by a desire for engaging variety and evaluates software through the lens of how novel and diverse its content feels. Their concise, balanced reviews highlight both repetitive shortcomings and appreciated extras, suggesting they aim to give prospective users a quick sense of overall enjoyment versus monotony.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an enthusiasm-driven casual gamer who prizes fast-paced, constantly engaging gameplay that feels challenging but still conquerable in a short binge. Their highly emotive, exclamation-filled reviews focus on sharing the visceral fun or frustration they experience rather than technical details, serving mainly to celebrate games that hook them and to vent when unclear hints halt their momentum. They write to encourage sequels and guide like-minded players toward titles that deliver the same addictive rush.

AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.product_description: Mayfan Elite Wireless Switch Controller for Nintendo Switch, Programmable Controller with Customized Back Buttons Support Gyro Axis, Turbo and Dual Vibration for Switch
AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.review_text: Batter life is amazing, has additional buttons you can program for those that are hardcore gamers.  I like the feel and design and really is a quality controller.  Not very good with the switch controls so having a gaming controller really helps me play at me best.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.product_description: Carrying Case Fit for Nintendo Switch Lite-,Protective Hard Shell Travel Box for Nintendo Switch Lite Console & Accessories,Dark Gray
AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.review_text: Case is extremely well put together, very sturdy, and keeps my Switch well protected.  Love the game pockets and mesh pocket for additional storage.  I can easily take everything I need on the go and feel like it is safe and protected.  Would highly recommend this case as it has everything I need.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.product_description: VOYEE Joycon Replacement for Nintendo Switch, Upgraded L/R Joy Con Switch Controller with Grip/Turbo/Share Button/Motion Control/Dual Shock - Red and Blue…
AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.review_text: Bought Mario Party and needed another controller for multiplayer, these are very well put together and pretty close to the original.  Buttons may be a little stiffer but virtually unnoticeable unless you are a hard core Switch player.  Battery life is great, well put together, and high quality.  Not more I can say but if you are looking for an affordable option for a controller this is the way to go.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.product_description: GameSir Protective Case Compatible with Nintendo Switch,Frosted Translucent with Shock-Absorption,Protective and Anti-Scratch Protective
AH4ORMYRUANUP45LQFPKZ36LQHSQ.review_text: This fits perfect to my switch with the cutouts lining up spot on.  Still can push all the buttons the same and the case does not get in the way.  Love the extra layer of protection against dirty fingers, dust, and also the shock absorption.  Just an added insurance policy for an expensive device so consider it a must have!
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AFB37VFU7TKHOTAJJBBEM3PAQPGA.product_description: Officially licensed for Xbox, the Turtle Beach Stealth 600 Gen 2 MAX wireless multiplatform gaming headset delivers an incredible battery life, and high-quality audio & chat for Xbox, PlayStation, Nintendo Switch, PC, and Mac.  A massive 48+hour battery life is a game-changer – providing enough juice to last most gamers weeks of play on one charge. Plus, with quick charging you can get 8.5 hours of battery life on just 15 minutes of charge time. Play on any platform thanks to the versatile USB-Transmitter, letting you play on Xbox, PlayStation, Nintendo Switch, PC, or Mac with the flip of a switch on the transmitter. A consistent, low-latency, lossless connection on Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, Xbox One, PS5 & PS4 consoles, Nintendo Switch, PC, and Mac is made possible by our proprietary lag-free 2.4GHz wireless technology, giving you a gameplay advantage over the competition. Hear immersive, detailed game audio, optimized for Windows Sonic, Dolby Atmos, & DTS Headphone X through a pair of expertly tuned 50mm speakers.  Call out your team’s next move with authority or chat clearly with friends thanks to a larger, high-sensitivity gen 2 flip-to-mute mic delivering improved chat clarity and now seamlessly integrates into the headset when muted. Plus, with mic monitoring you can hear the volume level of your voice in the headset so you can avoid shouting. A durable, reinforced headband and hinge design provide flexible, long-term durability, and soft, glasses-friendly ear cushions offer plush comfort. Easy access dials on the headset let you adjust master volume as well as independently control game & chat volume for the perfect mix. And the additional easy access controls let you cycle through audio presets, adjust the variable mic monitoring and activate Turtle Beach’s exclusive Superhuman Hearing for a definitive audio advantage. Officially Licensed for Xbox: Officially licensed by Microsoft for Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, Xbox One X, & Xbox One S to ensure a high-quality gaming audio & chat experience every time you connect.
AFB37VFU7TKHOTAJJBBEM3PAQPGA.review_text: turtle beaches have absolutely earned their good name with the fantastic quality they continuously put out, and these are nooo exception. They’re easy to connect to your system with the adapter you plug into a USB port and boom! Instant incredible sound, volume and clear voice output as well. Perfect for any gamer whether they casually play or whether they take gaming a bit too seriously and are on them alll day! Great deal for amazing quality, super well made and will definitely last for as long as you take care of them. We love ours whether we’re playing Fallout, Bioshock or even Minecraft. Work beautifully whether you’re online with friends or playing solo. Highly recommend
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHAYR5SU6BAVFEPOZNPXXH23PFOA.product_description: Weigh anchor and get ready to fight, sail, and loot in style with the Xbox Wireless Controller - Sea of Thieves Limited Edition. Gaze into the murky depths of the deep purple translucent design, adorned with laser etched barnacles, one treasured golden trigger, and haunted by a mysterious skull that glows at sundown. Enjoy custom button mapping and plug in any compatible headset with the 3.5mm stereo headset jack. Also includes Bluetooth for playing, plundering, and pillaging on Windows 10 PCs and tablets.
AHAYR5SU6BAVFEPOZNPXXH23PFOA.review_text: Fav for looks. Only thing thatd make it better? Rubberized diamond grips. Depite that, this controller fits wonderfully and i almost dont notice the missing grips. All in all, best controller yet. It even glows in the dark.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AFBE5QBV7INUB63RMHDBZS75L52A.product_description: Deruitu Switch Accessories Bundle Compatible with Nintendo Switch, Kit with Carrying Case, Screen Protector, Compact Playstand, Game Case, Joystick Cap, Charging Dock,Steering Wheel, (18 in 1)
AFBE5QBV7INUB63RMHDBZS75L52A.review_text: This is the BEST (and only) bundle you could ever want/need for a Nintendo Switch. This bundle has a carrying case, steering wheels, controllers, switch handles, screen protector, charging dock, game cartridge case AND a play stand. This has saved me SOOOOO much money by being able to buy this as a bundle instead of buying each item separately. Every item is well made and depending on what game you are playing, the accessories can make the game easier.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.product_description: Keep your Xbox One Kinect 2.0 sensor in place, whilst looking smart and compact. The Clips grip simply clips into place over the Kinect sensor to ensure it stays in place and provides optimum tracking during gameplay. The clips are adjustable, which ensures a perfect fit for flat/slim screen televisions. The secure locking mechanism keeps the Kinect 2.0 sensor in place, protecting it from damage whilst maintaining a smart, stylish look. They are very easy to clean, adjust, attach and remove and are the perfect solution for wall mounted televisions.
AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.review_text: I was skeptical that any stand would hold securely on my flat screen given the > 1" depth but this stand does so really well. It does not require any adhesive, it's highly adjustable and it forms to the TV so well that I can rotate my large TV just by applying pressure to the Kinect without touching the TV. I would highly recommend this product for both the quality and the price
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.product_description: Prowl the street of Gotham City
AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.review_text: Easily one of the best super hero games ever made. Lengthy, challenging and a surprisingly decent story line. I would highly recommend based on the character progression alone.

AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.product_description: RECORD SETTING 6 GAME CRITIC AWARD WINS! BEST OF SHOW BEST OF SHOW BEST ORIGINAL GAME BEST ORIGINAL GAME BEST CONSOLE GAME BEST CONSOLE GAME BEST PC GAME BEST PC GAME BEST ACTION GAME BEST ACTION GAME BEST ONLINE MULTIPLAYER BEST ONLINE MULTIPLAYER Prepare for Titanfall . Crafted by one of the co-creators of Call of Duty and other key developers behind the Call of Duty franchise, Titanfall is an all-new universe juxtaposing small vs. giant, natural vs. industrial and man vs. machine. The visionaries at Respawn have drawn inspiration from their proven experiences in first-person action and with Titanfall are focused on bringing something exciting the next generation of multiplayer gaming. KEY FEATURES Fast-Paced Future Warfare – In Titanfall the advanced warfare of tomorrow gives you the freedom to fight your way as both elite assault Pilot and agile, heavily armored 24’ tall Titans. Titanfall rethinks fundamental combat and movement giving players the ability to change tactics on the fly, attacking or escaping depending on the situation. Fast-Paced Future Warfare – In Titanfall the advanced warfare of tomorrow gives you the freedom to fight your way as both elite assault Pilot and agile, heavily armored 24’ tall Titans. Titanfall rethinks fundamental combat and movement giving players the ability to change tactics on the fly, attacking or escaping depending on the situation. The Future of Online Multiplayer Action – The game is entirely multiplayer, in a new experience that combines fast-paced online action with the heroic set piece moments traditionally found in campaign mode. The intersection of the two is a big part of what gives Ttianfall its iconic identity. The Future of Online Multiplayer Action – The game is entirely multiplayer, in a new experience that combines fast-paced online action with the heroic set piece moments traditionally found in campaign mode. The intersection of the two is a big part of what gives Ttianfall its iconic identity. The Visionaries that Defined Gaming for a Generation are back! — Founded in 2010, Respawn Entertainment was formed by Vince Zampella and Jason West, former co-founders of Infinity Ward and two of the co-creators of the multi-billion dollar franchise Call of Duty™ They are building on their pedigree and taking a new approach to game design and creating an all new universe with Titanfall The Visionaries that Defined Gaming for a Generation are back! — Founded in 2010, Respawn Entertainment was formed by Vince Zampella and Jason West, former co-founders of Infinity Ward and two of the co-creators of the multi-billion dollar franchise Call of Duty™ They are building on their pedigree and taking a new approach to game design and creating an all new universe with Titanfall
AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.review_text: A bit shallow but allot of fun when you get the hang of the mechanics and the flow. Allot better when playing with people you know as nobody seems to be using headsets (allot of games are heading this way). I would definitely recommend

AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.product_description: Bonus content includes: Harley Quinn's Revenge, Catwoman Pack, Robin Pack, Nightwing Pack, Arkham City Skins Pack and Challenge Map Pack
AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.review_text: One of the best super hero games out there, only beaten by it's successor (Origins). I would highly recommend based on the game world and character progression.

AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.product_description: Just off the Gransys mainland is the cursed Bitter black Isle where gamers will embark on an all-new quest to discover an underground realm, complete with new terrifying foes and incredible treasure. Owners of the original Dragon's Dogma will be able to export their existing characters and all other saved data to continue their journey as the Arisen, and face a new threat that has emerged from the cavernous depths. Players will be able to take their characters to new heights with brand new high-level skills and augments as well as all new weapons and armor sets. Furthermore, owners of the original Dragon's Dogma will receive 100,000 Rift Crystals, unlimited Ferry stones and the Gransys Armor Pack consisting of six brand new costumes for free, upon purchasing Dragon's Dogma: Dark Arisen. For those that missed Dragon's Dogma the first time around, Dragon's Dogma: Dark Arisen provides the opportunity to start their journey from the very beginning before tackling the all-new content. Based on player feedback, Dragon's Dogma: Dark Arisen will make the Dragon's Dogma gameplay experience even more satisfying with improvements such as easier travel and a more intuitive menu system. For those who already own Dragon's Dogma and then purchase Dragon's Dogma: Dark Arisen, these improvements will be automatically retrofitted to their original game save data.
AH3FRWOIICT6IFEIMP7AEYOMEGQQ.review_text: This is surprisingly a very well thought out game if you can get past the terrible story and lack luster graphics. The mechanics and RPG diversity is great, though there is a large overhead with little actual instruction into the nuances to deal with at first.

AGUKOFNC5PG4ZEAPKY6Q6RXE7R7Q.product_description: Overwatch - Game of the Year Edition - Xbox One
AGUKOFNC5PG4ZEAPKY6Q6RXE7R7Q.review_text: The characters and levels are well designed but it only has two modes that are almost identical. I need more. The game is flat, empty. We need more maps and more than two modes that feel so0 much the same to be an interesting change. If they don't do something before Battlefield 1 comes out, I think we will have another titan fall on our hands.

AGUKOFNC5PG4ZEAPKY6Q6RXE7R7Q.product_description: Product Description Welcome to the Stone Age, a time of extreme danger and limitless adventure, when giant mammoths and sabretooth tigers ruled the Earth, and humanity is at the bottom of the food chain. Learn to craft a deadly arsenal, fend off fierce predators, and outsmart enemy tribes to conquer the land of Oros and become the Apex Predator. The award-winning Far Cry franchise that stormed the tropics and the Himalayas now enters the original fight for humanity’s survival with its innovative open-world sandbox gameplay, bringing together massive beasts, breathtaking environments, and unpredictable savage encounters. From the Manufacturer MINIMUM PC CONFIGURATION OS: Windows 7, Windows 8.1, Windows 10 (64-bit versions only) PROCESSOR: Intel Core i3-550 | AMD Phenom II X4 955 or equivalent VIDEO CARD: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 460 (1GB VRAM) | AMD Radeon HD 5770 (1GB VRAM) or equivalent  SYSTEM RAM: 4GB HARD DISK: 20 GB PERIPHERALS: Windows-compatible keyboard, mouse, headset RECOMMENDED PC CONFIGURATION OS: Windows 7, Windows 8.1, Windows 10 (64-bit versions only) PROCESSOR: Intel Core i7-2600K | AMD FX-8350 or equivalent VIDEO CARD: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 780 | AMD Radeon R9 280X or equivalent SYSTEM RAM: 8GB HARD DISK: 20 GB PERIPHERALS: Windows-compatible keyboard, mouse, headset Supported Video Cards at Time of Release: AMD Radeon HD 5770 (1 GB VRAM) or better, HD 7000 / 200 / 300 / Fury X series, NVIDIA GeForce GTX 460 (1 GB VRAM) or better, GTX 500 / 600 / 700 / 900 / TITAN series Note: This product supports 64-bit operating systems only. Laptop versions of these cards may work, but are not officially supported. For the most up-to-date requirement listings, please visit the FAQ on Ubisoft support website. Peripherals: Windows-compatible keyboard, mouse, optional controller
AGUKOFNC5PG4ZEAPKY6Q6RXE7R7Q.review_text: This game is full interesting landscapes and tough enemies. I'd you liked the other Far Cry games then there is no reason to skip this one. If is full of all of the things that make the Far Cry series great.

AGUKOFNC5PG4ZEAPKY6Q6RXE7R7Q.product_description: Designed to be a cut above the rest, the Razer Wildcat has four additional buttons - two bumpers at the shoulders and two removable triggers on the underside. Positioned right at your fingertips, these Multi-Function Buttons can be individually set to remap any of the other controls found on the controller. With the ability to freestyle the configuration of your controller, you get to decide exactly how you pawn the competition.
AGUKOFNC5PG4ZEAPKY6Q6RXE7R7Q.review_text: So far this controller has been excellent. It is designed basically the same as the Sabertooth which I used for over a year without problems. It seems to be more durable than the Sabertooth. It is easy to program and I really like the extra buttons on the shoulder. It comes with a carry car and tool kit for repairs. It has rubber grips that can be added. It is very comfortable and the sticks have just the right amount of resistance  for me. The buttons have a good feel to them, very little pressure is needed. Overall I think this is a very well made controller. I will follow up in a few months though.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AE52FFLYVXIS5YNEEUWE6GQYPZAQ.product_description: KINGEAR Wireless Switch Controller for Nintendo Switch,Cute Dog Switch Pro Controller for Switch OLED/Lite with Turbo/Dual Motors/ 6 Axis Function,with 2 DIY Magnetic Replacement Switch Case Cover
AE52FFLYVXIS5YNEEUWE6GQYPZAQ.review_text: I bought this controller for the 2nd time for my wife because her hands are small and this controller is PERFECT size for anyone with small hands. My controller started having major drift issues, so I started borrowing this controller to game with and it's really very comfortable to use and the battery life on it is really great! Having said that, after having the controller for the last few years, it drifts down a lot now. The controller really got a TON of use! We probably put well over 500 hours of gaming into that controller on Animal Crossing and Pokemon, so I didn't mind buying it again. Just seems that lots of controllers nowadays have drift issues.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AF7UFKYUX6CABFIY7BW3K75HPDEQ.product_description: Revolutionary, Intuitive, Precise.The DUALSHOCK 4 Wireless Controller for the PlayStation 4 system defines the next generation of play, combining revolutionary new features like the multi touch pad and Share button with intuitive, precision controls.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AG56OJBG3LR6Z2J7TB2TO257GNEQ.product_description: Tee off with family and friends in this content-packed Mario Golf gameHit the green with up to four players locally* or online** and golf with familiar Mushroom Kingdom characters. Modes range from Standard Golf to the energetic Speed Golf and an RPG-like golf adventure in story mode. Intuitive motion or button controls, a shot gauge that adapts to the curve of the course, and other new features make it easy for both new players and seasoned pros to drive and putt with power.Swing simultaneously and make a break for the ball in Speed GolfTee off at the same time with up to three other players* and race through the course to get your ball in first. Outpace and interrupt your opponents with dashes and special shots. Mario, for example, can blow other players' balls away.Rise through the ranks of golf training in story modeEnroll your Mii character in golf training in a prestigious country club and go from rookie to pro! You’ll face off against your Mushroom Kingdom classmates and earn experience points. Level up to improve your character’s stats like power, movement, and spin. You can bring your character (and their customized stats) into other modes, too!*Additional games, systems and/or accessories may be required for multiplayer mode. Games, systems and some accessories sold separately.**Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online features. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply.
AG56OJBG3LR6Z2J7TB2TO257GNEQ.review_text: Although the golf adventure was way too short and I would have loved more options and customizable options for my player and their room, the actual golf play was great. It's a must have for anyone who loves these kinds of games. Also the ability to play a round of golf whenever you want with folks around the world is pretty cool. What would be awesome is if they would add more courses at some point. I've played every course and loved them all. Was just sad at how quickly the story part was over and after you beat your game you cant keep playing your character and keep improving them.

AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.product_description: Kingdom Hearts III tells the story of the power of friendship and light vs. darkness as Sora and his friends embark on a perilous adventure. Set in a vast array of Disney and Pixar worlds, Kingdom Hearts follows the journey of Sora, an unknowing heir to a spectacular power. Sora is joined by Donald Duck and Goofy to stop an evil force known as the Heartless from invading and overtaking the universe. Sora, Donald, and Goofy unite with iconic Disney Pixar characters old and new to overcome tremendous challenges and persevere against the darkness threatening their worlds.Adventure in Disney and Pixar WorldsEmbark on an adventure that spans the Disney universe: Travel across Disney and Pixar worlds to protect them from the Heartless invasion, and befriend and join heroes from Toy Story, Monsters, , Big Hero 6, Tangled, Hercules, and moreUnlock the Power of the Key bladesThe mysterious and powerful Key blades can now transform into additional forms with new abilities, moves, and animations. Equip multiple Key blades and combo between them to unlock spectacular attacksExperience the MagicCast visually stunning, powerful magic spells to battle the Heartless. Call upon Disney Pixar friends and partner with them for support. Turn the tide of combat by summoning all new “ Attractions” inspired by the theme parks.Thrilling and Action Packed BattlesExplore and interact directly with the Disney Pixar worlds. Fight off swarms of Heartless while scaling massive cliffs, diving deep underwater, or even free falling through the air. Experience unique game play elements custom designed for each new worldRelive Classic Disney Shorts Through Mini games Take a break from saving the world with over 20 mini games inspired by classic Disney short films.
AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.review_text: I was extremely excited to play the first Kingdom Hearts game way back in the day on the PS2. It was a phenomenal game that made me excited to play. I instantly purchased Kingdom Hearts 2 the day it came out and I felt extremely confused of the story because I had not played the Nintendo DS games that came out between KH1 and KH2. flash forward 13 years later and we finally have KH3 and though there are many great things, I don't think it's worth it. The story is extremely convoluted and unless you've played all the other games, you'll have to sit through a YouTube video to help explain what's happening. The worlds have always been the best part of KH and this game rehashes several worlds from the previous games. Though it looks great and playing is seemless, there's a ton of little extra things that bogs down the game instead of enhancing it such as finding ingredients to make dishes. The controls have a lot going on and there are tutorials for everything which makes playing a bit cumbersome. What I was so excited to play, I really find a chore since the story doesn't make a lot of sense, though it's pretty, I feel like they waited far too long to release this game.

AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.product_description: Dragon Quest XI: Echoes of an Elusive Age tells a captivating tale of a hunted hero and is the long-awaited role-playing game from series creator Yuji Horii and character designer Akira Toriyama. While it is the eleventh mainline entry in the critically acclaimed series, Dragon Quest XI is a completely standalone experience that features entirely new characters, a beautifully detailed world, finely tuned turn-based combat, and an immersive story that will appeal to longtime fans and franchise newcomers alike. After its release in Japan, Dragon Quest XI won multiple gaming awards and received critical praise, including PlayStation's Platinum Prize and a perfect 40/40 score from Famitsu (an influential video game publication in Japan).
AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.review_text: I have been a DQ fan since the beginning back when the US called the series Dragon Warrior and I have played every sequel through DQ11 (minus the MMO DQ10 that was not released here) and I can assure you that this is one of the best RPGs of all time. You do not need to play any other DQ game in order to play this one. The game is easy to pick up and you can easily clock in over 100 hours of game time. I don't want to spoil anything here but I will say that once you finish the game, the REAL game begins and provides you tons of more gameplay. The graphics are great, the characters are likable and the game flows extremely well.

AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.product_description: Fallout 76 - Tricentennial Edition for Xbox One Bethesda Game Studios, the award-winning creators of Skyrim and Fallout 4, welcome you to Fallout 76, the online prequel where every surviving human is a real person. Work together, or not, to survive. Under the threat of nuclear annihilation, youll experience the largest, most dynamic world ever created in the legendary Fallout universe.  Reclamation Day, 2102. Twenty-five years after the bombs fall, you and your fellow Vault Dwellerschosen from the nations best and brightest emerge into post-nuclear, System requirement minimum your device must meet all minimum requirements to open this product OS Xbox One architecture x64, Recommended your device should meet these requirements for the best experience OS Xbox One architecture x64. Features You will Emerge! You will Emerge! Multiplayer finally comes to the epic open world RPGs of Bethesda Game Studios. Create your character with the S.P.E.C.I.A.L system and forge your own path in a new and untamed wasteland with hundreds of locations. Whether you journey alone or with friends, a new and unique Fallout adventure awaits. Multiplayer finally comes to the epic open world RPGs of Bethesda Game Studios. Create your character with the S.P.E.C.I.A.L system and forge your own path in a new and untamed wasteland with hundreds of locations. Whether you journey alone or with friends, a new and unique Fallout adventure awaits. Mountain Splendorland! Mountain Splendorland! All-new graphics, lighting and landscape technology brings to life six distinct West Virginia regions. From the forests of Appalachia to the noxious crimson expanses of the Cranberry Bog, each region offers its own risks and rewards. Post-nuclear America has never looked so beautiful! All-new graphics, lighting and landscape technology brings to life six distinct West Virginia regions. From the forests of Appalachia to the noxious crimson expanses of the Cranberry Bog, each region offers its own risks and rewards. Post-nuclear America has never looked so beautiful! A New American Dream! A New American Dream! Use the all-new Construction and Assembly Mobile Platform (C.A.M.P.) to build and craft anywhere in the world. Your C.A.M.P. will provide much-needed shelter, supplies, and safety. You can even set up shop to trade goods with other survivors. But beware, not everyone will be quite so neighborly. Use the all-new Construction and Assembly Mobile Platform (C.A.M.P.) to build and craft anywhere in the world. Your C.A.M.P. will provide much-needed shelter, supplies, and safety. You can even set up shop to trade goods with other survivors. But beware, not everyone will be quite so neighborly. The Power of the Atom! The Power of the Atom! Go it alone or with fellow survivors to unlock access to the ultimate weapon Nuclear Missiles. This destruction also creates a high-level zone with rare and valuable resources. Do you protect or unleash the power of the atom? The choice is yours. Go it alone or with fellow survivors to unlock access to the ultimate weapon Nuclear Missiles. This destruction also creates a high-level zone with rare and valuable resources. Do you protect or unleash the power of the atom? The choice is yours. Game requires Xbox Live Gold to play on Xbox (subscription sold separately). Offers in-app purchases
AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.review_text: I've been a big fan of Fallout for awhile now and I was extremely excited to get this game the day it came out. Words cannot express how disappointing this game is. There are no other characters in the game except the handful of others that are online at the same time. There's not a whole lot to do while in the game. There are a ton of bugs that screw up what you're doing. Everything that made the Fallout series fun is absent. Do yourself a favor and go and play Fallout 4 instead of this crap.

AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.product_description: Generations ago, the realm of Alefgard was plunged into darkness when the hero fated to slay the terrible and treacherous Dragon lord, the ruler of all monsters, was instead tricked into joining him. Through this vile villain's magical machinations, mankind was scattered to the winds and robbed of the power to build. With even the idea of creativity relegated to mere legend, the people of Alefgard wander the ruins of their former home, scrounging and scavenging in the dust to survive. But now, a legendary figure arises - a hero chosen by the Goddess herself - who sets out to return the power of creation to the people of Alefgard. Only when the wonder of imagination has been returned to the land will mankind be able to overthrow the evil Dragon lord once and for all!
AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.review_text: If you are a fan of Minecraft or if you were a fan of the first Dragon Quest game, this could be a game for you. It basically goes through the different towns you came across in the first DQ game in 5 different scenarios. You mine and create different items in each story to rebuild a town that the Darklord destroyed. It's cute and fun albeit a bit repetitive and it can be frustrating that once you get used to building great items to have to start all over again. I found it to be more relaxing than exciting.

AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.product_description: Enter an era of war within the world of Ivalice. The small kingdom of Dalmasca, conquered by the Archadian Empire, is left in ruin and uncertainty. Princess Ashe, the one and only heir to the throne, devotes herself to the resistance to liberate her country. Vaan, a young man who lost his family in the war, dreams of flying freely in the skies. In a fight for freedom and fallen royalty, join these unlikely allies and their companions as they embark on a heroic adventure to free their homeland. Final Fantasy XII The Zodiac Age improves upon the 2006 classic Final Fantasy XII, now more beautiful and easier to play than ever. The high-definition remaster introduces several modern advancements, including reconstructed battle design and a revamped job system. With newly implemented trophies and share functions, as well as stark visual and sound improvements in true HD for the first time, players both returning and new to the game will experience a grand adventure that spans the world of Ivalice in an entirely fresh and improved way.
AH5CL6RPF4RLM77MNCWBHHYMEHQQ.review_text:
Being an avid fan of Final Fnatasy since the first one, I think there's a lot of good things going on with this remaster. The game looks great. There is a 4x speed up option to get through areas and grind levels fast. The grid system is interesting and gives you options to replay the game.
The only issue is that the story is a bit convoluted. The names of places are on the edge of absurd and the cut scenes are a bit lengthy. I would still say it's a solid game and shorter than other FF games.

AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.product_description: iReliev TENS Unit Muscle Stimulator Combination with Premium Carry Case - TENS for Pain Relief & Arthritis - EMS for Muscle Strength, Recovery, Relaxation - Back, Shoulder, Abdomen, Leg, Knee, & More
AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.review_text:
The package that I have received:

1 PC TENS + EMS Unit
2 PCS 48” Lead Wires
4 PCS 2” x 2” Electrode Pads
2 PCS 3.5” x 5” Electrode Pads
3 PCS AAA Batteries
1 PC Belt Clip Holster
1 PC Premium Carrying Case

Does what it is supposed to and at a relatively low price, it has 4 pads and has various options for the type of massage you want and you are able to reduce or increase the intensity at any point. You can have different massages going at the same time in two different areas and can have different intensities in the two different areas also.

AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.product_description: YEEIN Auto Hair Curler, Wired Automatic Hair Curler for Long Hair Anti-Scald Rotary Curling Iron，Temperature Display and Adjustable Curl Direction Fast Heating，Negative Lonic Protection (Green)
AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.review_text: I probably would have used this product 20 times in a year for may 10-15 mins each time and it has stopped working. When I first used it, was so please with its performance, it made perfect curls but I am not a big fan of heat products so only use them sparingly. It’s such a shame that this product only lasted less than a year for a price that’s far from being cheap. I don’t know if the product was faulty and if it is then the supplier should be replacing it but there is no way to reach out to them.

AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.product_description: 3-IN-1 Cordless Window Vacuum Cleaner With Strong Suction&Spraying Head and Mopping- Universal USB Charger, Applicable to Multiple Surfaces
AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.review_text: This is a great little tool but with a short lifespan. I have had this for months and it does not charge at all now. If I had known it would only work for 3 months I would not have got it. Would not recommend it- disappointing

AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.product_description: Zealtop Leg Massage Rollers fitroll pro Massage Cellulite Calf Muscle Roller for Calves Arms Tennis Elbows for Muscle Soreness Stiffness After Work Out Exercise(Black)
AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.review_text: I bought this for my muscle aches. All the rollers seem sturdy and have certainly survived my Kids for playing with it. In terms of their actual use, it's a really comprehensive set for all aches, muscles pains, and hard-to-reach spots. Would definitely recommend it!

AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.product_description: Double Electric Breast Pump with Milk Bottle,Three-in-one Design,Portable and Lightweight,BPA Free,Pain Free,Closed System,Touch Sensitive,Free 6 Milk Storage Bags
AHSEGNS77TLPYIWMD7JKHV4VPTBA.review_text: This is honestly one of the good  pumps I've used! It's simple to use and self explanatory. The flange is comfortable on the breast providing a better expressing experience. The suction is great, I express quite a lot using this pump. It's small and discreet and doesn't have much sound to it at all! I reccomend this pump! For the cost it's such a great pump compared to others that can be 4x the price.

AGDQCJWEQ5D4LRTWNYR4BUG54N7Q.product_description: For ages 13 and up only. *Offer valid with the purchase of a new Meta Quest 2 device (128GB or 256GB) (“Qualifying Product”) between August 1, 2022 12:01 AM PST– December 31, 2022 11:59 PM PST and while supplies last. User account (“Account”) required. Offer Item (digital content): Beat Saber in the Meta Quest Store (approx. retail value $29.99). Additional downloadable content, including future music packs and other content, sold separately. To receive Offer Item, Qualifying Product must be first activated between August 1, 2022 12:01 AM PST - January 31, 2023 11:59 PM PST through an Account without Beat Saber entitlement previously enabled on such account (“Activation”). Upon Activation, you will receive a notification message via email, in your mobile app, and in VR with a link to redeem the Offer Item from the Meta Quest Store. There are no redemption codes in connection with this Offer. Offer Item must be redeemed within 14 days upon Activation. Once redeemed, Offer Item remains available for download indefinitely. Limit of one (1) Offer Item per Qualifying Product, regardless of the number of Accounts connected to such Qualifying Product. Qualifying Products first activated through an Account with Beat Saber entitlement previously enabled are ineligible to receive Offer Item. Not valid on prior orders or purchases. Offer is non-transferable, not for resale, and not valid for cash or cash equivalent. Offer may be canceled or modified at any time without notice. Void where prohibited or restricted.
AGDQCJWEQ5D4LRTWNYR4BUG54N7Q.review_text: Lots of supporting peripherals, games and other utilities to use with one of the better supported VR sets.  I used to use VR equipment in the old style, so the resolution when used with a good phone system and such is pretty awesome over what they used to have.  I personally use one that links to a video game console system, but similar games and peripherals are available for this to fly, fight, explore the ocean, and other fun things.  Runs a bit on the expensive side, but like I said Well supported, lots of available upgrades.  I think when I put it in the auction it had the twin gun holders that linked to the controls for war or western related gun fight type shooters.  I don't think the game support is quite the level of the two main console units, but VR exploration is more than games, and you don't need all the processing power of the consoles to use this.  It links up freer than the others so you're not at tethered, but careful you don't react too much to the environment or you might break something in the non-virtual world.  Best to get his with a high-end phone as that should make the experience better.  Mine was just OK so nothing special.  Because of support on this maker, it's less likely to disappear as obsolete any time soon.  Recommended.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGDQCJWEQ5D4LRTWNYR4BUG54N7Q.product_description: ShanWan Wireless Mobile Game Controller for Android/iphone, Phone Controller for Cloud gaming, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate, PS Remote Play, xCloud, Stadia, GeForce NOW, Luna, with LED Backlight and
AGDQCJWEQ5D4LRTWNYR4BUG54N7Q.review_text:
I recently started playing a new adaption of a legendary game by a famous RPG company on my PC. It was free to download and play, but they introduced a new real money purchase system. The game has seasons lasting a few weeks, and making progress is fairly easy compared to some problems they had with an old version of the same title. That title had a real money store, but it was roundly critiqued, because you were so severely limited in the game unless you spent money. This new one is not that bad, but there are a lot of paths to temptation, and constant things reminding you what you can get for a few bucks or more. The higher levels became a lot more difficult to play, and I noticed a dichotomy with paying players and non-pay that developed and made early team forming more difficult to work with later on. Part of the reason is my play using a certain character, they would lose control and then get killed. This was mostly because the game was designed to work with cell phones, and PC support was poor. I didn't want to spend a lot of cash, so I gave up on the PC version and deleted my free account.

After reading news about the game online, I realized the it was mainly to open a new revenue market in the cell phone rapidly advancing gaming culture. A free download from a famous gaming company with the estimated multi-billion cell phones out there as a base market, was a big source of revenue to tap. This controller would have made that even easier, as I'm not very adept with cell phone controls as are some. I might have gone over to the dark side, and spent money to enhance my play. I'm quite happy with shooters, jumpers, bomber man, and puzzle games, so this control is great for those. It fit my BLU phone quite nicely and works well. I got a HD hand held game recently, and it has a lot of built in games, but a 2.6" screen so I go blind tying to play them. Several ports exist for the best games in the array it comes with, so I can play them properly on my much larger cell phone screen. This control is key for allowing that to happen. I won't join the cult of that famous game, but I really like having this control. Recommended.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.product_description: Product Description Explore the center of Isola in this innovative new chapter in the Virtual Villagers series, while you reckon with a band of mysterious masked heathens, who do not believe in you! Guide your tribe as they attempt to convert the savages, by dismantling their precious totems and removing their scary masks! Make them believe! From the Manufacturer Explore the center of Isola in this innovative new chapter in the Virtual Villagers series, while you reckon with a band of mysterious masked heathens, who do not believe in you! Guide your tribe as they attempt to convert the savages, by dismantling their precious totems and removing their scary masks! Make them believe! Visit the center of the Island of Isola. Visit the center of the Island of Isola. Masked heathens that need to be shown the light. Masked heathens that need to be shown the light. Mysterious heathen Totems to be dismantled. Mysterious heathen Totems to be dismantled. Many God Powers to impress your villagers and the heathens! Many God Powers to impress your villagers and the heathens! New puzzles, new collectibles, new Island Events! New puzzles, new collectibles, new Island Events! AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.review_text: Loved this one as much as the first four.  They keep getting better and better.  I hope they keep making them!!!

AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.product_description: From the Manufacturer Prove you're a genius with The Moron Test, the App Store's leading brain-teaser! Graduate from Moron to Genius as you click, twist, and shake your way through these fun and tricky challenges! Master the test, then share it with your friends and family! The Moron Test is one of the App Store's best selling apps of all time and has over 11 million downloads worldwide. Play now and see why The Moron Test has become a household name! The Moron Test - it's fun to FAIL! System Requirements Minimum Specifications: OS:Windows 7, Vista, and XP SP3 Processor:1GHz CPU RAM:512 MB Hard Drive:50 MB Video Card:on-board video Additional Info:Unknown
AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.review_text: It is very fast paced, but it is a test, and I really felt like a moron when I missed something!!!  But enjoyed it!!!!!

AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.product_description: From the Manufacturer It's time to get creative! When you inherit the Cavendish heirloom china company, it's in desperate need of some work. The once grand dinnerware company is now in need of new patterns to restore its reputation for elegance and quality. From classic to contemporary, you'll scour the globe for the best patterns and ingredients, and then refine each piece of dinnerware for the production line. Perfect the glaze for each piece and shape each plate, bowl, and pitcher expertly to create the world's finest china. Maximize production by ordering your ingredients, and make your factories run like clockwork. Find buyers in different cities to help you grow your business, and compare prices with your suppliers to get the best deals. Create striking and exotic plates and accent pieces, to take your company from humble heirloom china company to rare treasure empire! Unlock all 8 global locations to take your business international! Unlock all 8 global locations to take your business international! Collect 80 different recipes for the finest china pieces Collect 80 different recipes for the finest china pieces Create 16 striking collections Create 16 striking collections Travel the globe in search of the best ingredients Travel the globe in search of the best ingredients Rebuild your china company into a Rare Treasure empire! Rebuild your china company into a Rare Treasure empire! System Requirements Minimum Specifications: OS:Win 7, Vista and XP Processor:1.6 GHz RAM:512 MB Hard Drive:175 MB Video Card:16 or 32-bit Video Card with 64 MB VRAM Additional Info:DirectX: 9.0
AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.review_text: I thought this game was really fun, although it is very repetitious.  It is still fun to try and figure out where to go when.  It keeps you very busy so it does not get boring.

AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.product_description: You're flying cargo across the Atlantic Ocean when the talisman on the seat beside you begins to glow. The next thing you know, you've crash-landed on an uncharted island and are staring into the face of a 400-year-old pirate. It's not your typical day, and The Treasures of Mystery Island isn't your typical seek-and-find! Find the hidden pieces of various objects and assemble them into items you can use to solve puzzles that will take you into the heart of an incredible mystery!
AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.review_text: I loved this game!!! It was very fun to play, although I think I played it all in one or two nights, but I just couldn't stop until I beat it.

AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.product_description: Aboard the historic Orient Express, as Antoinette Marceau, a new character introduced in the game, you must help the famous Belgian detective Hercule Poirot solve the puzzling murder of Mr. Ratchett. Is the victim really who he claimed to be? What motive would any of the passengers have that would bring them to commit this heinous crime? It is up to YOU to find out!
AGHXI3Z5EVHNCGG7WT3SAKBXKC2Q.review_text: This game is alright!!! I like it but I got stuck and the hint is telling me to do something and I cannot find what I am suposed to. So I quit playing it.
